name: MultiZap-Bot Dev Environment
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2 libxshmfence1 libnss3 libx11-xcb1 libxss1 libasound2 && npm install
